svg.font-family: DejaVu Sans, Liberation Sans, Arial, sans-serif

g.title: Interactive controls: • Hover inside plot → x,y coordinate readout near cursor • Hover a point → native tooltip with values • Click a point → highlight it, dim others; click again to release • Click legend entry → mute/unmute that group • Click empty area or Esc → reset all • Search → type a group name or x/y value to filter
